title: NEED A Monday.com Expert For My Fire & security Alarm Company
excerpt:
LOOKING TO HIRE SOME ONE TO CREATE MY MONDAY.COM SYSTEM.

Sales System Automation:


a. Lead
b. Quote
c. Contracts Generated
d. Contracts Emailed To …

posts.author: JASFIRSECURITY (Joseph Stinson)
posts.cookedHtml:
LOOKING TO HIRE SOME ONE TO CREATE MY MONDAY.COM SYSTEM.

. Some of the stuff that we would require in our system would be:

    1. Sales System Automation:
    • a. Lead
    • b. Quote
    • c. Contracts Generated
    • d. Contracts Emailed To Customer Via Panda Doc Or Docusign
    • e. Contracts Sent back
    • f. Contracts Store in customer file
    • g. Sales Order Generated.
    • h. Service Order Generated & Booked
    1. Service System:
    • a. Ability To Book Service Calls
    • b. Service Calls To be booked from new sales orders
    • c. Auto SMS Texting & Email App Reminder and Conformation
    1. Marketing
    • a. Mail Chimp
    1. Customer Portal
    • a. Bill Payment Module
    • b. Invoice module
    • c. Schedule Service Module

We would need the Office 365 Suite & Teams & Azure AD integrated into the system.

This is just some of the stuff that comes to mind right now.

posts.cookedHtml:

posts.author: Ricky.Tomer (Ricky Tomer)
posts.cookedHtml:

There are a lot of great partners to work with and I would like to introduce the team at CarbonWeb. Our team has developed an out-of-the-box solution that will allow you to take monday.com to the next level for you and your team with minimal effort. posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Joseph!

Choosing monday dot com as your enterprise’s project management system is a commendable decision!

By creating boards on monday dot com, you can easily organize and manage sales, service, marketing, and customer support seamlessly. Board creation helps you group and monitor processes like lead generation, record service calls, and understand the proper relations. Besides, integrating your monday dot com account with MailChimp allows your in-house marketing experts to manage multiple campaigns from one space, sync subscribers and leads, send automated replies, and get notifications.

The consultants from Damco solutions can help you with board creation, MailChimp, and QuickBooks integration for handling invoices. We’re one of the experienced monday com partners. Our dedicated monday.com consultants have accomplished a range of complex monday com projects for clients across the world.

Regards
Neelam B
Damco Solutions
Phone: +1 609 632 0350 | Email : info@damcogroup.com
